response.justification: Bogdan presents an exceptional profile for a Technical Lead, demonstrating deep experience in large-scale distributed systems, cloud-native architecture (Kubernetes, AWS CDK), and DevOps infrastructure. His extensive history as a senior developer, founder, and workshop instructor highlights strong technical leadership, mentoring capabilities, and a commitment to engineering best practices. While his specific C++ programming experience does not meet the 8-year minimum, his proficiency in other systems-level languages (DLang) and his broad, highly relevant technical background make him a strong candidate worthy of an interview to explore the C++ requirement and his leadership approach further.
strengths: Extensive experience with large-scale distributed systems and cloud-native architecture (Kubernetes, AWS CDK).
Proven technical leadership, mentoring, and ability to establish engineering best practices.
Strong background in DevOps infrastructure, CI/CD, and driving complex technical projects.
concerns: Does not meet the 8-year minimum experience requirement for C++ programming.
Limited recent hands-on experience with C++ in professional roles.
No explicit mention of balancing short- and long-term cloud architecture needs in production.
